description: Fed raised rates 50bps in March 2024. Market initially dropped but recovered within a week. Net effect was mildly negative.
prompt: The Federal Reserve just raised interest rates by 50 basis points. How will the stock market react over the next week?
context: Current S&P 500 is at all-time highs. Inflation is at 3.2%, down from 4.1% six months ago. Unemployment is 3.7%.

ground_truth_outcome.notes: S&P 500 dropped 2.1% on announcement day, recovered 1.4% over the following 4 days. Net -0.7% for the week. Mildly bearish outcome.
